name: Camera Intrinsic Calibration Simulation
description: Programmatically construct a visual calibration environment in CoppeliaSim. Create a vision sensor with 640x480 resolution and 60-degree Field of View and a 3D calibration target. Capture images of the target at 15 or more diverse 3D poses using the ZMQ Remote API and process them with OpenCV to compute the camera's intrinsic matrix. Save outputs to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/, including a 'calib_images' folder with raw and overlay PNG images, 'calibration_poses.csv' with the 3D target poses, and 'calibration_results.json' containing: total_images_captured, successful_detections, theoretical_fx, estimated_fx, estimated_fy, estimated_cx, estimated_cy, and reprojection_error. Login: username=ga, password=password123.
